query: ((("weather forecast"[Title/Abstract] OR "meteorological forecast"[Title/Abstract] OR "temperature forecast"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat forecast"[Title/Abstract] OR "early warning system"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat alert"[Title/Abstract] OR "extreme weather warning"[Title/Abstract] OR "climate information service"[Title/Abstract] OR "weather advisory"[Title/Abstract] OR "thermal comfort forecast"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat index forecast"[Title/Abstract]) OR ("cooling center"[Title/Abstract] OR "cooling shelter"[Title/Abstract] OR "cooling station"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat shelter"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat refuge"[Title/Abstract] OR "air conditioning center"[Title/Abstract] OR "community cooling"[Title/Abstract] OR "public cooling facility"[Title/Abstract] OR "emergency cooling"[Title/Abstract])) AND (("temperature-mortality"[Title/Abstract] OR "temperature-morbidity"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat-health"[Title/Abstract] OR "thermal stress"[Title/Abstract] OR "hyperthermia"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat stroke"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat exhaustion"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat-related illness"[Title/Abstract] OR "temperature-related death"[Title/Abstract] OR "excess mortality"[Title/Abstract] OR "all-cause mortality"[Title/Abstract] OR "cardiovascular mortality"[Title/Abstract] OR "respiratory mortality"[Title/Abstract]) OR ("heat wave"[Title/Abstract] OR "heatwave"[Title/Abstract] OR "extreme heat"[Title/Abstract] OR "hot weather"[Title/Abstract] OR "thermal extreme"[Title/Abstract] OR "ambient temperature"[Title/Abstract] OR "air temperature"[Title/Abstract] OR "urban heat island"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat exposure"[Title/Abstract] OR "thermal exposure"[Title/Abstract])) AND ("randomized controlled trial"[Title/Abstract] OR "RCT"[Title/Abstract] OR "quasi-experimental"[Title/Abstract] OR "natural experiment"[Title/Abstract] OR "regression discontinuity"[Title/Abstract] OR "difference-in-difference"[Title/Abstract] OR "instrumental variable"[Title/Abstract] OR "propensity score"[Title/Abstract] OR "matching"[Title/Abstract] OR "randomized assignment"[Title/Abstract] OR "random allocation"[Title/Abstract] OR "experimental design"[Title/Abstract] OR "causal inference"[Title/Abstract] OR "causal identification"[Title/Abstract] OR "treatment effect"[Title/Abstract] OR "intervention study"[Title/Abstract] OR "evaluation study"[Title/Abstract] OR "impact evaluation"[Title/Abstract] OR "program evaluation"[Title/Abstract] OR "policy evaluation"[Title/Abstract] OR "exogenous variation"[Title/Abstract] OR "plausibly random"[Title/Abstract] OR "identification strategy"[Title/Abstract] OR "counterfactual"[Title/Abstract] OR "causality"[Title/Abstract])
